title: Repository, Python Runtime, SDKs, Dependencies, and Reproduction · Language Clinic: Sdk Version Surface
summary: The prototype runs from an unknown revision with a floating Gemini SDK, a copied deprecated import, hidden environment state, no license inventory, and no clean-install proof. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the sdk version surface increment in reproducible Python agent repository baseline. Learners progress through prediction, expl…
objectives: Distinguish google-genai, deprecated predecessor SDKs, google-adk, API versions, model versions, stable features, previews, and migrations.
Pin direct and resolved dependencies, verify package sources and hashes, review licenses and advisories, and prove isolated installation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-sdk-version-surface — Distinguish google-genai, deprecated predecessor SDKs, google-adk, API versions, model versions, stable features, previews, and migrations.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-repo-runtime-dependencies-3
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-repo-runtime-dependencies-3.
# Case 5798: a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review.
# Operating constraint: every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy.
# Changed case: change one tool call, argument, authority, result, or failure and preserve correlation.
def worked_agentpy_repo_runtime_dependencies_3(declared_dependencies: int = 7, resolved_dependencies: int = 7, clean_installs: int = 3, supported_python_versions: int = 2, unresolved_advisories: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "authorityworked3",
        "interaction5798",
        "tool3dekrow",
        "stateworked35798",
        "evaluation5798worked3",
        "recovery3dekrow5798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if declared_dependencies < 1 or resolved_dependencies < 1:
        return False, resolved_dependencies, "dependency-shape"
    if resolved_dependencies != declared_dependencies:
        return False, resolved_dependencies, "dependency-drift"
    if clean_installs < 2 or supported_python_versions < 1:
        return False, clean_installs, "reproduction-gap"
    if unresolved_advisories > 0:
        return False, unresolved_advisories, "advisory-gap"
    assert resolved_dependencies == declared_dependencies and clean_installs >= 2
    return True, clean_installs, "reproducible-agent-baseline"
